source_keyword: mid century modern bedroom ideas master
title: Mid Century Modern Bedroom Design
description:
This was my first interior design project in Singapore, where I designed an entire HDB apartment from scratch under a tight timeline so construction could start as soon as possible. The clients, a couple with dogs, trusted me to create a home that is functional, comfortable, and visually cohesive while meeting local regulations and construction requirements.

I wrote a short article on Substack about this experience and what I learned while designing within Singapore’s housing system.
If you're interested in the process, you can read the full article here:
https://substack.com/home/post/p-189891175
